summary: The diff implements comprehensive Google OAuth configuration guidance and error handling. REQ-1 is addressed through frontend/.env.example with detailed setup instructions, validation in useYouTubeChannel.ts checking VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, and improved error messages. REQ-2 is addressed through OAuth flow implementation in useYouTubeChannel.ts, callback handling in OAuthCallback.tsx, backend integration in useQueries.ts, and UI state management in ChannelConnection.tsx. However, the diff does not show evidence of end-to-end verification testing or actual successful OAuth completion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify that the Google OAuth connection flow works end-to-end after the Client ID is configured
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows implementation of OAuth flow components but does not provide evidence of verification testing, end-to-end testing results, or confirmation that users can successfully complete the OAuth authorization flow and post clips to YouTube
